title: Perfect gym shoe
review_text: Stable for squats, flexible for box jumps. The midfoot strap locks everything down. Replaced my old cross-trainers and never looked back.

title: Great for lifting not running
review_text: Tried to run a mile warm-up in these and my feet were not happy. But for lifting and HIIT they're perfect. Flat sole is exactly what you want for deadlifts.
